TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ow-ni-s-te.La-say-bu u saayaway a nan-cye ci Ni-al-sen a La-say-bu, Om,FRS " Ing a kamu Ernest Rutherford, 1st Baron Rutherford of Nelson, 1871 a mihca 8 a bulad 30 a demiad-1937 a mihca 10 a bulad 19 a demiad", Niw-si-lan u-li-sye-cye, i kitakit singanganay a yen-ce-he-u-lisye a wama. migingkiway tu sapasubana' u katinengan ciniza kilul Ba-la-ti zikuz u kahemekan nu mitanam a u-li-sye-cya. ś≠źŚÖßśĖĮÁČĻ¬∑ ,OM,FRS(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Ernest Rutherford, 1st Baron Rutherford of Nelson,1871ŚĻī8śúą30śó•‚ÄĒ1937ŚĻī10śúą19śó•), . nilaculan La-say-bu saayaw patahkal tu bang-se-sin pan-suway-ci a nizateng, mipatatungus tu bang-se-syen malilid ku makay cacay a yen-su katukuh tu zumay a yen-su amasumad. bang-se-sin a tuud duduc patusul tu tineng pasasuma tu őĪ se-sye atu B se-syen, asaca mipatatungus tu nuayawanay uyza u hay-li-ce. zayhan, sakay "yen-su a nikasumad atu bang-se-sye hwa-sye a nigikiwan", pakala ciniza tu 1908 a mihcaan tu Now-pey-al hwa-sye a kawlah. . La-say-bu mikilid tu masakaputay malaheci mipatatungus tu i yen-ce cung-sin izaw ku yen-ce-he, misabaluhay patizeng tu Say-bu-a kasahiza. saayaway malaheci ciniza tu i tan atu őĪ li-ce a he pagilay pasasuma tu yen-ce, mapulung mitanam lalabu maazih tu ku ce-ce, asaca pangangan han tu ce-ce. saka 104 banggu yen-su a mikineng cinizaan tu nipangangan tu "Lu". "ťĎ™". nikauzipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ 1871 a mihca 8 a bulad 30 a demiad, ci La-say-bu lecuh i Niw-silan-ni-al-sen capiay a S-pu-lin-ke-low-bu "ayza nu tungus Pu-lay-te-ow-te", lumaay a calakakaan 12 ku tademaw, u ama niza mikawaw tu siking atu mipela' Ya-ma a kawaw, adidi' henay hina i luma'ay milutalutay a kusi atu miedap i Ya-ma kusi, namahiza pasubana' tu wawa u situngusay u ina. kowcung micudad ciniza i Hay-bu-low-ke, pahezik namicudad pabalucu' ciniza miala tu Ni-al-sen-sye-yen a kawlah, picudada tu nikauzipan niza u cayay kapawan a ninateng, i ayaw amapatay ciniza mahiza tu caay kapawan mitudawa tu acawa niza paini tu 100 pang pabeli tu Ni-al sen sye-yen, kilul 1890 a mihcaan micumud tciniza tu Kan-te-lye talakaway a cacudadan itiza malikeluh niza ku kasikazan a cyaw-su, , i pililidan nuheni ci La-say-bu tu sakay ke-sye a gingkiw sangaleb ku kaicelang, namikawaw tu tusa a mihcaan tu tyen-ce-sye nu saayway migingkiw. zikuz 1891 a mihcaan ciniza i "migingkiw tu tyen-ce" pakala tu sapaazih a kawlah.1895 a mihcaan, ci La-say-bu pakala tu kawlah a kalisiw, pitengil uyni a demiad i umah mikutkut tu ma-lin-su cinza, katinengan ci La-say-bu pakala tu seking sikawlah tu kalisiw, limaay a sakutkut bakah sa musakamu, "uyni u sazikuzay tu a nikutkutan aku a ma-lin-su". ". katukuh Ing-kow cyen-cyaw talakaway a cacudadan 31 sye-yen Ka-win-ti-si pitanengan migingkiw tu pow-se, salipahakay sa milayap tuyza nipasubana' ni Ye-se-bu.Tang-mu-sen. sawninay makay Niw-si-lan katukuh i Cyen-cyaw hawsa, sademiad sa micudad, makazih mahiza u "matinengay mikutkutay a pawalil". itiza ciniza pacena' mahiza tu maazih ku kitakit nu satanaya'ay a u-syen-ten-pow " tusa ing-li" a nikiluan, zikuz kilul maazih ku tin-ceay a Tang-mu-sen mala migingkiw. i pigingkiwan tu u-ce pibang-sean, mipabaluhay misanga' tu kisut a kamu, őĪ "A-al-ba" atu ő≤ "pey-ta" a dil, u pikinsa maazih ku ő≤ a dil u dadawaay ku culil, icelang ku nikabesut nu ten-ce. . i 1898 a mihcaan ci La-say-bu mapaculcul mala Cya-na-ta-May-ci-al talakaway a cacudadan nu u-li- a cuzen, pitadengan maazih niza ku bang-se-sin a pan-suway-ci, bang-se-sin u-ce pangangan han őĪ atu ő≤ bang-sen, uyni syang a pinaneng mapabeli i 1908 a mihcaan a Now-pey-al hwa-sye a kawlah, zayhan makinsa niza ku pihulak tu yen-su, hwa-sye atu bang-se-syen u-ce. Śú®1898ŚĻī, . pawacay tu ciniza tu ba-ng-se-sen u yen-ce kahiza kalawacu masumad. nika caay kanamuh ciniza, zayhan saca u u-li-sye-cya kaku sa caay ku migingkiway tu hwa-sye. u singangan nu musakamuay niza, "ke-sye uyza dada' u-li sye-ke, cacay a sye-ke, zuma uyza u pisuped tu yu-pyaw a kawaw dada'". 1925 a mihcaan katukuh 1930 a mihcaan, ciniza mala hungti luma' sye-huy huy-cang atu zikuzanay nu midebungay sitinengay miedap tu li-se-huy cusi, miedap tu makayniay i Te-kow macapi tu 1000 ku tademaw nu talakaway midebungay nu sitenengay. 1925 a mihcaan ci La-say-bu pakala tu nu Ing-kow cen-hu a nipakawlahan tu kung-ci-sin-cang, 1931 a mihcaan pangangan han Ni-al-sen-a La-say-bu nan-cye. cacay ku tataynaan a wawa niza, ku-cye-wi i kapatayan niza caay tu kalalacan. i wawa henay hawsa, ci La-say-bu siimelang tu cayay kapihaceng a makabutulay, nika pakuniza han niza, caay pisakaph mingaay cinizaan, sazikuzay malahad makakulawit mapuut tu ku sawada', pihaceng satu ku imelang niza .1937 a mihcaan, anu mahicahica ku pisakalah micici', ci La-say-bu i Cyen-cyaw zikuz tu 4 a demiad mapatay tu ipadekuan u kamu nu misaydan "mabulsen ku sawda'" sa. u kudih niza i Ke-te-s-ke-lin a tatuduhan mituduh, zikuz u kasenengan tadem han i Si-mey-san, micapi tu Niw-tun atu zuma singanganay a Ing-kow ke-sye-cya.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ow-ni-s-t…ô.r~…ĺa-saj-bu u saajawaj a nan- ¶j…ô ¶i ni-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn a r~…ĺa-saj-bu, om,f*s " iŇč a kamu …ôrn…ôst *utńß…ôrford, *st baron *utńß…ôrford of n…ôr~…ĺson, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad-**** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad", niw-si-r~…ĺan u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô- ¶j…ô, i kitakit siŇčaŇčanaj a j…ôn- ¶…ô-ńß…ô-u-r~…ĺisj…ô a wama. migiŇčkiwaj tu sapasubana Ē~ ° u katin…ôŇčan ¶iniza kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ba-r~…ĺa-ti zikuz u kańß…ôm…ôkan nu mitanam a u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô- ¶ja. ***** ,om,f*s(**:…ôrn…ôst *utńß…ôrford, *st baron *utńß…ôrford of n…ôr~…ĺson,**********************), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan r~…ĺa-saj-bu saajaw patańßkar~…ĺ tu baŇč-s…ô-sin pan-suwaj- ¶i a nizat…ôŇč, mipatatuŇčus tu baŇč-s…ô-sj…ôn mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku makaj ¶a ¶aj a j…ôn-su katukuńß tu zumaj a j…ôn-su amasumad. baŇč-s…ô-sin a tuud dudu ¶ patusur~…ĺ tu tin…ôŇč pasasuma tu * s…ô-sj…ô atu b s…ô-sj…ôn, asa ¶a mipatatuŇčus tu nuajawanaj ujza u ńßaj-r~…ĺi- ¶…ô. zajńßan, sakaj "j…ôn-su a nikasumad atu baŇč-s…ô-sj…ô ńßwa-sj…ô a nigikiwan", pakar~…ĺa ¶iniza tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ ńßwa-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß. . r~…ĺa-saj-bu mikir~…ĺid tu masakaputaj mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mipatatuŇčus tu i j…ôn- ¶…ô ¶uŇč-sin izaw ku j…ôn- ¶…ô-ńß…ô, misabar~…ĺuńßaj patiz…ôŇč tu saj-bu-a kasańßiza. saajawaj mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ¶iniza tu i tan atu * r~…ĺi- ¶…ô a ńß…ô pagir~…ĺaj pasasuma tu j…ôn- ¶…ô, mapur~…ĺuŇč mitanam r~…ĺar~…ĺabu maazińß tu ku ¶…ô- ¶…ô, asa ¶a paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ¶…ô- ¶…ô. saka *** baŇčgu j…ôn-su a mikin…ôŇč ¶inizaan tu nipaŇčaŇčan tu "r~…ĺu". "*". nikauzipan** **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i niw-sir~…ĺan-ni-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn ¶apiaj a s-pu-r~…ĺin-k…ô-r~…ĺow-bu "ajza nu tuŇčus pu-r~…ĺaj-t…ô-ow-t…ô", r~…ĺumaaj a ¶ar~…ĺakakaan ** ku tad…ômaw, u ama niza mikawaw tu sikiŇč atu mip…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° ja-ma a kawaw, adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ńßina i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj mir~…ĺutar~…ĺutaj a kusi atu mi…ôdap i ja-ma kusi, namańßiza pasubana Ē~ ° tu wawa u situŇčusaj u ina. kow ¶uŇč mi ¶udad ¶iniza i ńßaj-bu-r~…ĺow-k…ô, pańß…ôzik nami ¶udad pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶iniza miar~…ĺa tu ni-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn-sj…ô-j…ôn a kawr~…ĺańß, pi ¶udada tu nikauzipan niza u ¶ajaj kapawan a ninat…ôŇč, i ajaw amapataj ¶iniza mańßiza tu ¶aaj kapawan mitudawa tu a ¶awa niza paini tu *** paŇč pab…ôr~…ĺi tu ni-ar~…ĺ s…ôn sj…ô-j…ôn, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ **** a mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud t ¶iniza tu kan-t…ô-r~…ĺj…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan itiza mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß niza ku kasikazan a ¶jaw-su, , i pir~…ĺir~…ĺidan nuńß…ôni ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu tu sakaj k…ô-sj…ô a giŇčkiw saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku kai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, namikawaw tu tusa a mińß ¶aan tu tj…ôn- ¶…ô-sj…ô nu saajwaj migiŇčkiw. zikuz **** a mińß ¶aan ¶iniza i "migiŇčkiw tu tj…ôn- ¶…ô" pakar~…ĺa tu sapaazińß a kawr~…ĺańß.**** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu pakar~…ĺa tu kawr~…ĺańß a kar~…ĺisiw, pit…ôŇčir~…ĺ ujni a d…ômiad i umańß mikutkut tu ma-r~…ĺin-su ¶inza, katin…ôŇčan ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu pakar~…ĺa tu s…ôkiŇč sikawr~…ĺańß tu kar~…ĺisiw, r~…ĺimaaj a sakutkut bakańß sa musakamu, "ujni u sazikuzaj tu a nikutkutan aku a ma-r~…ĺin-su". ". katukuńß iŇč-kow ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ** sj…ô-j…ôn ka-win-ti-si pitan…ôŇčan migiŇčkiw tu pow-s…ô, sar~…ĺipańßakaj sa mir~…ĺajap tujza nipasubana Ē~ ° ni j…ô-s…ô-bu.taŇč-mu-s…ôn. sawninaj makaj niw-si-r~…ĺan katukuńß i ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw ńßawsa, sad…ômiad sa mi ¶udad, makazińß mańßiza u "matin…ôŇčaj mikutkutaj a pawar~…ĺir~…ĺ". itiza ¶iniza pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° mańßiza tu maazińß ku kitakit nu satanaja Ē~ °aj a u-sj…ôn-t…ôn-pow " tusa iŇč-r~…ĺi" a nikir~…ĺuan, zikuz kir~…ĺur~…ĺ maazińß ku tin- ¶…ôaj a taŇč-mu-s…ôn mar~…ĺa migiŇčkiw. i pigiŇčkiwan tu u- ¶…ô pibaŇč-s…ôan, mipabar~…ĺuńßaj misaŇča Ē~ ° tu kisut a kamu, * "a-ar~…ĺ-ba" atu * "p…ô-ta" a dir~…ĺ, u pikinsa maazińß ku * a dir~…ĺ u dadawaaj ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku nikab…ôsut nu t…ôn- ¶…ô. . i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu mapa ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa ¶ja-na-ta-maj- ¶i-ar~…ĺ tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan nu u-r~…ĺi- a ¶uz…ôn, pitad…ôŇčan maazińß niza ku baŇč-s…ô-sin a pan-suwaj- ¶i, baŇč-s…ô-sin u- ¶…ô paŇčaŇčan ńßan * atu * baŇč-s…ôn, ujni sjaŇč a pinan…ôŇč mapab…ôr~…ĺi i **** a mińß ¶aan a now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ ńßwa-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß, zajńßan makinsa niza ku pińßur~…ĺak tu j…ôn-su, ńßwa-sj…ô atu baŇč-s…ô-sj…ôn u- ¶…ô. ******, . pawa ¶aj tu ¶iniza tu ba-Ňč-s…ô-s…ôn u j…ôn- ¶…ô kańßiza kar~…ĺawa ¶u masumad. nika ¶aaj kanamuńß ¶iniza, zajńßan sa ¶a u u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô- ¶ja kaku sa ¶aaj ku migiŇčkiwaj tu ńßwa-sj…ô. u siŇčaŇčan nu musakamuaj niza, "k…ô-sj…ô ujza dada Ē~ ° u-r~…ĺi sj…ô-k…ô, ¶a ¶aj a sj…ô-k…ô, zuma ujza u pisup…ôd tu ju-pjaw a kawaw dada Ē~ °". **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶iniza mar~…ĺa ńßuŇčti r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sj…ô-ńßuj ńßuj- ¶aŇč atu zikuzanaj nu mid…ôbuŇčaj sitin…ôŇčaj mi…ôdap tu r~…ĺi-s…ô-ńßuj ¶usi, mi…ôdap tu makajniaj i t…ô-kow ma ¶api tu **** ku tad…ômaw nu tar~…ĺakawaj mid…ôbuŇčaj nu sit…ôn…ôŇčaj. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu pakar~…ĺa tu nu iŇč-kow ¶…ôn-ńßu a nipakawr~…ĺańßan tu kuŇč- ¶i-sin- ¶aŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan paŇčaŇčan ńßan ni-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn-a r~…ĺa-saj-bu nan- ¶j…ô. ¶a ¶aj ku tatajnaan a wawa niza, ku- ¶j…ô-wi i kapatajan niza ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶an. i wawa ńß…ônaj ńßawsa, ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu siim…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu ¶ajaj kapińßa ¶…ôŇč a makabutur~…ĺaj, nika pakuniza ńßan niza, ¶aaj pisakapńß miŇčaaj ¶inizaan, sazikuzaj mar~…ĺańßad makakur~…ĺawit mapuut tu ku sawada Ē~ °, pińßa ¶…ôŇč satu ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč niza .**** a mińß ¶aan, anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a ku pisakar~…ĺańß mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °, ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu i ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw zikuz tu * a d…ômiad mapataj tu ipad…ôkuan u kamu nu misajdan "mabur~…ĺs…ôn ku sawda Ē~ °" sa. u kudińß niza i k…ô-t…ô-s-k…ô-r~…ĺin a tatuduńßan mituduńß, zikuz u kas…ôn…ôŇčan tad…ôm ńßan i si-m…ô-san, mi ¶api tu niw-tun atu zuma siŇčaŇčanaj a iŇč-kow k…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ow-ni-s-te.La-say-bu u saayaway a nan-cye ci Ni-al-sen a La-say-bu, Om,FRS " Ing a kamu Ernest Rutherford, 1st Baron Rutherford of Nelson, 1871 a mihca 8 a bulad 30 a demiad-1937 a mihca 10 a bulad 19 a demiad", Niw-si-lan u-li-sye-cye, i kitakit singanganay a yen-ce-he-u-lisye a wama. migingkiway tu sapasubana' u katinengan ciniza kilul Ba-la-ti zikuz u kahemekan nu mitanam a u-li-sye-cya. ś≠źŚÖßśĖĮÁČĻ¬∑ ,OM,FRS(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Ernest Rutherford, 1st Baron Rutherford of Nelson,1871ŚĻī8śúą30śó•‚ÄĒ1937ŚĻī10śúą19śó•), . nilaculan La-say-bu saayaw patahkal tu bang-se-sin pan-suway-ci a nizateng, mipatatungus tu bang-se-syen malilid ku makay cacay a yen-su katukuh tu zumay a yen-su amasumad. bang-se-sin a tuud duduc patusul tu tineng pasasuma tu őĪ se-sye atu B se-syen, asaca mipatatungus tu nuayawanay uyza u hay-li-ce. zayhan, sakay "yen-su a nikasumad atu bang-se-sye hwa-sye a nigikiwan", pakala ciniza tu 1908 a mihcaan tu Now-pey-al hwa-sye a kawlah. . La-say-bu mikilid tu masakaputay malaheci mipatatungus tu i yen-ce cung-sin izaw ku yen-ce-he, misabaluhay patizeng tu Say-bu-a kasahiza. saayaway malaheci ciniza tu i tan atu őĪ li-ce a he pagilay pasasuma tu yen-ce, mapulung mitanam lalabu maazih tu ku ce-ce, asaca pangangan han tu ce-ce. saka 104 banggu yen-su a mikineng cinizaan tu nipangangan tu "Lu". "ťĎ™". nikauzipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ 1871 a mihca 8 a bulad 30 a demiad, ci La-say-bu lecuh i Niw-silan-ni-al-sen capiay a S-pu-lin-ke-low-bu "ayza nu tungus Pu-lay-te-ow-te", lumaay a calakakaan 12 ku tademaw, u ama niza mikawaw tu siking atu mipela' Ya-ma a kawaw, adidi' henay hina i luma'ay milutalutay a kusi atu miedap i Ya-ma kusi, namahiza pasubana' tu wawa u situngusay u ina. kowcung micudad ciniza i Hay-bu-low-ke, pahezik namicudad pabalucu' ciniza miala tu Ni-al-sen-sye-yen a kawlah, picudada tu nikauzipan niza u cayay kapawan a ninateng, i ayaw amapatay ciniza mahiza tu caay kapawan mitudawa tu acawa niza paini tu 100 pang pabeli tu Ni-al sen sye-yen, kilul 1890 a mihcaan micumud tciniza tu Kan-te-lye talakaway a cacudadan itiza malikeluh niza ku kasikazan a cyaw-su, , i pililidan nuheni ci La-say-bu tu sakay ke-sye a gingkiw sangaleb ku kaicelang, namikawaw tu tusa a mihcaan tu tyen-ce-sye nu saayway migingkiw. zikuz 1891 a mihcaan ciniza i "migingkiw tu tyen-ce" pakala tu sapaazih a kawlah.1895 a mihcaan, ci La-say-bu pakala tu kawlah a kalisiw, pitengil uyni a demiad i umah mikutkut tu ma-lin-su cinza, katinengan ci La-say-bu pakala tu seking sikawlah tu kalisiw, limaay a sakutkut bakah sa musakamu, "uyni u sazikuzay tu a nikutkutan aku a ma-lin-su". ". katukuh Ing-kow cyen-cyaw talakaway a cacudadan 31 sye-yen Ka-win-ti-si pitanengan migingkiw tu pow-se, salipahakay sa milayap tuyza nipasubana' ni Ye-se-bu.Tang-mu-sen. sawninay makay Niw-si-lan katukuh i Cyen-cyaw hawsa, sademiad sa micudad, makazih mahiza u "matinengay mikutkutay a pawalil". itiza ciniza pacena' mahiza tu maazih ku kitakit nu satanaya'ay a u-syen-ten-pow " tusa ing-li" a nikiluan, zikuz kilul maazih ku tin-ceay a Tang-mu-sen mala migingkiw. i pigingkiwan tu u-ce pibang-sean, mipabaluhay misanga' tu kisut a kamu, őĪ "A-al-ba" atu ő≤ "pey-ta" a dil, u pikinsa maazih ku ő≤ a dil u dadawaay ku culil, icelang ku nikabesut nu ten-ce. . i 1898 a mihcaan ci La-say-bu mapaculcul mala Cya-na-ta-May-ci-al talakaway a cacudadan nu u-li- a cuzen, pitadengan maazih niza ku bang-se-sin a pan-suway-ci, bang-se-sin u-ce pangangan han őĪ atu ő≤ bang-sen, uyni syang a pinaneng mapabeli i 1908 a mihcaan a Now-pey-al hwa-sye a kawlah, zayhan makinsa niza ku pihulak tu yen-su, hwa-sye atu bang-se-syen u-ce. Śú®1898ŚĻī, . pawacay tu ciniza tu ba-ng-se-sen u yen-ce kahiza kalawacu masumad. nika caay kanamuh ciniza, zayhan saca u u-li-sye-cya kaku sa caay ku migingkiway tu hwa-sye. u singangan nu musakamuay niza, "ke-sye uyza dada' u-li sye-ke, cacay a sye-ke, zuma uyza u pisuped tu yu-pyaw a kawaw dada'". 1925 a mihcaan katukuh 1930 a mihcaan, ciniza mala hungti luma' sye-huy huy-cang atu zikuzanay nu midebungay sitinengay miedap tu li-se-huy cusi, miedap tu makayniay i Te-kow macapi tu 1000 ku tademaw nu talakaway midebungay nu sitenengay. 1925 a mihcaan ci La-say-bu pakala tu nu Ing-kow cen-hu a nipakawlahan tu kung-ci-sin-cang, 1931 a mihcaan pangangan han Ni-al-sen-a La-say-bu nan-cye. cacay ku tataynaan a wawa niza, ku-cye-wi i kapatayan niza caay tu kalalacan. i wawa henay hawsa, ci La-say-bu siimelang tu cayay kapihaceng a makabutulay, nika pakuniza han niza, caay pisakaph mingaay cinizaan, sazikuzay malahad makakulawit mapuut tu ku sawada', pihaceng satu ku imelang niza .1937 a mihcaan, anu mahicahica ku pisakalah micici', ci La-say-bu i Cyen-cyaw zikuz tu 4 a demiad mapatay tu ipadekuan u kamu nu misaydan "mabulsen ku sawda'" sa. u kudih niza i Ke-te-s-ke-lin a tatuduhan mituduh, zikuz u kasenengan tadem han i Si-mey-san, micapi tu Niw-tun atu zuma singanganay a Ing-kow ke-sye-cya.

"*". nikauzipan** **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i niw-sir~…ĺan-ni-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn ¶apiaj a s-pu-r~…ĺin-k…ô-r~…ĺow-bu "ajza nu tuŇčus pu-r~…ĺaj-t…ô-ow-t…ô", r~…ĺumaaj a ¶ar~…ĺakakaan ** ku tad…ômaw, u ama niza mikawaw tu sikiŇč atu mip…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° ja-ma a kawaw, adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ńßina i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj mir~…ĺutar~…ĺutaj a kusi atu mi…ôdap i ja-ma kusi, namańßiza pasubana Ē~ ° tu wawa u situŇčusaj u ina. kow ¶uŇč mi ¶udad ¶iniza i ńßaj-bu-r~…ĺow-k…ô, pańß…ôzik nami ¶udad pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶iniza miar~…ĺa tu ni-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn-sj…ô-j…ôn a kawr~…ĺańß, pi ¶udada tu nikauzipan niza u ¶ajaj kapawan a ninat…ôŇč, i ajaw amapataj ¶iniza mańßiza tu ¶aaj kapawan mitudawa tu a ¶awa niza paini tu *** paŇč pab…ôr~…ĺi tu ni-ar~…ĺ s…ôn sj…ô-j…ôn, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ **** a mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud t ¶iniza tu kan-t…ô-r~…ĺj…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan itiza mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß niza ku kasikazan a ¶jaw-su, , i pir~…ĺir~…ĺidan nuńß…ôni ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu tu sakaj k…ô-sj…ô a giŇčkiw saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku kai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, namikawaw tu tusa a mińß ¶aan tu tj…ôn- ¶…ô-sj…ô nu saajwaj migiŇčkiw. zikuz **** a mińß ¶aan ¶iniza i "migiŇčkiw tu tj…ôn- ¶…ô" pakar~…ĺa tu sapaazińß a kawr~…ĺańß.**** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu pakar~…ĺa tu kawr~…ĺańß a kar~…ĺisiw, pit…ôŇčir~…ĺ ujni a d…ômiad i umańß mikutkut tu ma-r~…ĺin-su ¶inza, katin…ôŇčan ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu pakar~…ĺa tu s…ôkiŇč sikawr~…ĺańß tu kar~…ĺisiw, r~…ĺimaaj a sakutkut bakańß sa musakamu, "ujni u sazikuzaj tu a nikutkutan aku a ma-r~…ĺin-su". ". katukuńß iŇč-kow ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ** sj…ô-j…ôn ka-win-ti-si pitan…ôŇčan migiŇčkiw tu pow-s…ô, sar~…ĺipańßakaj sa mir~…ĺajap tujza nipasubana Ē~ ° ni j…ô-s…ô-bu.taŇč-mu-s…ôn. pisakar~…ĺańß mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °, ¶i r~…ĺa-saj-bu i ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw zikuz tu * a d…ômiad mapataj tu ipad…ôkuan u kamu nu misajdan "mabur~…ĺs…ôn ku sawda Ē~ °" sa. u kudińß niza i k…ô-t…ô-s-k…ô-r~…ĺin a tatuduńßan mituduńß, zikuz u kas…ôn…ôŇčan tad…ôm ńßan i si-m…ô-san, mi ¶api tu niw-tun atu zuma siŇčaŇčanaj a iŇč-kow k…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja.
